Setup Instructions

1
In TikTok Live Studio, click Add Source and choose Link
2
Click Copy on any widget above, paste the full URL into the Link field
3
Set Width × Height to match each widget's size shown on the card
4
Position on your scene — Header top, Alert center, Ticker bottom. All widgets are transparent
5
Resize by dragging corners to fit your layout
1
In OBS or Streamlabs, click + in Sources and choose Browser
2
Click Copy on any widget above and paste into the URL field
3
Set Width × Height exactly as shown on each widget card
4
Check Shutdown source when not visible and Refresh browser when scene becomes active
5
Layer widgets — Header top, Alert center, Ticker bottom
Private Pack — Mint Overlays × mintoverlays.com
